title: dendrobium recurvatum
intro: Dendrobium recurvatum, also known as the Asian dendrobium, is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dendrobium recurvatum include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory infections, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and ground into a powder, or made into a tea, and is used to treat a range of ailments due to its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects.
